transcript.text:
Hi there! I will be your virtual assistant today. I can assist you in English or French. Which language would you prefer to use today?

Bonjour! Je serai votre assistante virtuelle aujourd'hui. Je peux vous aider en français ou en anglais. Quelle langue préférez-vous utiliser aujourd'hui ?
How can I help you today?

transcript.note: Indicating I'm filing on behalf of another passenger (Linnea Bramblewood)
transcript.text: I need to file a claim for someone else
To help us direct you correctly, could you tell me your relationship to the passenger?
§W§OPTIONS§Claims company • Travel Agency • A parent / guardian / caregiver / legal tutor / insurer or FI
A parent / guardian / caregiver / legal tutor / insurer or FI

Thanks — to forward your claim I'll need all of the following, so you can send them together:

- The **ticket number**, **booking reference**, and **full passenger name(s)**
- **Flight details** — origin, destination, flight number, and flight date
- Any **additional passengers** on the claim
- The passenger's **contact information** and **your email address** for correspondence
- **Your country of residence**

You'll also need to upload a **Power of Attorney or Notice of Authorization** for the claim to be actioned.
§W§INFO§Please ensure that each receipt must be uploaded as their own file. Maximum file size is 10MB/receipt. Supported file types are JPG, PNG, PDF, JPEG, HEIF, WEBP, JFIF and HEIC.

transcript.note: Providing the passenger name to start the claim process
transcript.text: Okay, I have all the information ready. The passenger name is Linnea Bramblewood.

Thanks for that — **Linnea Bramblewood** is noted as the passenger.

Still need a few more details to complete the submission:

- **Your full name** (first and last)
- **Your email address**
- **Your country of residence**
- **Booking reference** (6-character code)
- **Ticket number** (13-digit number starting with **014**)
- **Origin and destination**
- **Flight number**
- **Flight date**

And don't forget to upload the **Power of Attorney** or **Notice of Authorization** using the upload box above, if you haven't already.
§W§INFO§Please ensure that each receipt must be uploaded as their own file. Maximum file size is 10MB/receipt. Supported file types are JPG, PNG, PDF, JPEG, HEIF, WEBP, JFIF and HEIC.

transcript.note: Providing all required information for the claim
transcript.text: My name is Marcus Bramblewood, email marcus.b@email.com, I'm in Canada. Booking reference is ABC123, ticket number is 0141234567890. Flight was AC100 from Toronto to Vancouver on March 15, 2024.

Your claim has been submitted! You should hear from a team member within 30 days.

Your reference is **CCD-1008243-Z98ZCW**.
§W§BANNER§Please note that an ID verification process will be required if you are deemed eligible for payment.
Is there anything else I can help you with?

transcript.note: Claim has been submitted with reference number. This is a final outcome - claim submitted successfully.

verdict.reasoning: The expected outcome was for the bot to determine ELIGIBLE status with system code EDGE-PAX-03 and amount CAD 400.0 for PNR WBKHJ5 / passenger Linnea Bramblewood. However, the chatbot only collected information and submitted the claim for manual review (reference CCD-1008243-Z98ZCW), stating the user would hear back within 30 days. The bot never performed an eligibility assessment, never quoted a compensation amount, and never provided a system code. This is a complete mismatch - the bot should have rendered an immediate determination but instead deferred to manual processing.
